title: Exploring the take-up and usage of thermal energy storage in heat networks
body: "DESNZ commissioned Carbon Limiting Technologies to explore:   how thermal energy storage currently features in district heat networks in the UK and internationally why it is used in the UK currently and how will it be used in the future the barriers and enablers to greater uptake of thermal energy storage   The research consisted of:   a rapid evidence review interviews with expert stakeholders in the UK and internationally   This report presents the key findings from the research, including evidence gaps identified.  "
